overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red dress walking through a neon-lit coastal city at night. The character moves from an open waterfront road with palm trees into a covered commercial plaza, eventually stopping at a street food vendor where a visual glitch effect with sparks occurs.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waterfront promenade with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to the coastal road with palm trees lining the street

notable_agents.action: car driving along the wet coastal road with headlights on

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the coastal road against the night sky
tall street lamps illuminating the wet pavement with warm light
rain-slicked asphalt road reflecting street lights and vehicle headlights
illuminated bus stop shelter with glass panels and bench

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet coastal promenade at night, with palm trees swaying against a dark cloudy sky. Street lamps cast reflections on the rain-slicked pavement while cars drive along the adjacent road. The atmosphere is calm and distinctly cyberpunk with neon accents visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza entrance with modern glass architecture

events.description: character turns right from the open coastal road into the covered entrance of a commercial plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right and entering the covered walkway area of the modern commercial complex

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated interior
covered walkway entrance leading into the commercial plaza
glowing neon signs attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a covered plaza entrance, transitioning from the open waterfront to a more enclosed urban space. Modern glass buildings rise on either side with neon signage beginning to dominate the visual field. The lighting shifts from street lamps to a mix of artificial and neon sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with digital billboards and neon advertisements

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant neon and artificial sources as character enters the plaza interior with large digital screens

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit plaza past digital advertisements and other pedestrians scattered throughout the space

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction through the plaza

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying animated content on building facade
multi-story glass building with illuminated windows and reflective surfaces
concrete bench seating along the right side of the walkway
decorative trees with uplighting planted in the plaza center
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious commercial plaza bathed in neon light from massive digital billboards and storefront signs. Glass office buildings surround the area with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible in the distance. Other pedestrians walk through the space, and decorative trees with uplighting add greenery to the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor area with teal neon lighting and concrete architecture

events.description: character slows down and stops at the food vendor stall to interact
visual glitch effect with blue sparks and spatial distortion appears near the character and vendor

agents.ego_description: stopped at the food stall engaging with the vendor, then experiencing a visual glitch effect with sparks

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food cart serving customers
pedestrian walking past the food stall on the right

entered.detail: yellow food vendor cart with illuminated menu and cooking equipment
building entrance framed with bright teal neon lighting
tan canvas awning extending over the food cart

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a street food vendor cart with a yellow awning and teal neon-lit doorway nearby. The vendor stands behind the cart while other pedestrians walk past. Towards the end of the clip, a visual glitch effect with blue sparks and spatial distortion manifests around the character, suggesting a game engine artifact or in-game event.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy coastal promenade into a dense, neon-saturated commercial plaza. It begins with the character walking along a wet waterfront under a dark cloudy sky, where street lamps reflect off rain-slicked pavement beside swaying palm trees. As the character turns right, the open coastal air transitions into an enclosed urban space where modern glass buildings and artificial neon signage begin to dominate the visual field. The scene then expands into a spacious plaza bathed in the glow of massive digital billboards and uplit decorative trees, moving past other pedestrians and under a distant pedestrian bridge. Finally, the camera settles as the character stops at a street food vendor with a yellow awning, just as a visual glitch of blue sparks and spatial distortion manifests around them.
